name: Gupshup
description: Gupshup — Conversational messaging API platform for WhatsApp, SMS, RCS, and other chat channels.

seo.title: Gupshup — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Gupshup: Gupshup — Conversational messaging API platform for WhatsApp, SMS, RCS, and other chat channels.

when_to_use: WhatsApp chatbot for customer service automation
RCS messaging upgrade path from SMS for enterprises
Multi-channel messaging API: WhatsApp + SMS + chat
Conversational commerce flow on WhatsApp for retail
OTP delivery via WhatsApp as SMS fallback

pros: Deep WhatsApp BSP capabilities at enterprise scale
Covers SMS, RCS, voice and chatbots in one
Good coverage in India, SEA, LatAm, Africa
Prebuilt bot builder and conversation tooling
cons: Console feels sprawling after many acquisitions
Support quality varies noticeably by region
Platform polish trails Twilio/Infobip in parts
review.verdict: Heavyweight conversational CPaaS for emerging markets — powerful if you can navigate the product surface.
review.best_for: Enterprises rolling WhatsApp and omnichannel across India, SEA, LatAm
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a single clean API and predictable self-serve pricing
